Dialog.name: TRL_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}If you get injured while exploring Tartarus, you can use items and skills to restore HP or SP.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 3}Open the {f 1 3 112} menu, select {f 0 1 2}ITEM{f 0 1 27}, and choose a recovery item, such as {f 4 4 0 37 1 16385} or {f 4 4 0 37 1 16412}. Then choose a party member.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 2}Skills work in a similar way. Start by opening the menu, select {f 0 1 2}SKILL{f 0 1 27}, and pick a recovery skill, such as {f 0 1 35}Dia{f 0 1 27}. Then choose a party member.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: TRL_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 8 0}It's best to prioritize {f 4 2}'s HP so that he doesn't faint while exploring.[n]{f 1 1}
